positive: A hyper-detailed, highly contrasting celestial creature silhouette emerging from flowing, bioluminescent cosmic dust. The primary subject is a stylized, symmetrical crescent moon fox, depicted in profile, with geometric, stylized fur patterns. The background is deep midnight blue and violet, contrasted by bursts of electric teal and warm golden nebula smoke. Composition is centered, utilizing strong negative space and sharp, clean edges for optimal printability. Style: Neo-Art Deco, vaporwave aesthetic, Japanese mythology influence, maximalist detail, clean vector art quality, digital painting, high contrast.
negative: low quality, worst quality, cropped, jpeg artifacts, grainy, blurry, text, signature, logo, watermark, excess color noise, cartoon, childish, abstract background elements, low contrast, poorly drawn, asymmetrical
